name: Python / SciPy
description: The general-purpose scientific computing stack that underpins modern engineering scripting, data analysis, automation, and lightweight modelling in aerospace teams.
whyUseIt: Python and the SciPy ecosystem make it easy to move from spreadsheet-grade reasoning into repeatable engineering analysis. In aerospace, that means sizing loops, test-data analysis, and quick technical tools that are easy to share.
fieldPosition: Cross-disciplinary analysis, automation, and engineering tooling
engineerWorkflow: Use notebooks or scripts to automate sizing loops, analyse flight-test data, generate plots, and create fast technical trade-study tools.
managerExpects: Readable code, checked assumptions, and analysis that can be rerun when the design changes.
demoDescription: Build a simple sizing or cycle-analysis notebook and show how changing one parameter alters the design conclusion.
beginnerMistakes: Writing one-off scripts with no clear assumptions or version control
Using code to generate numbers without checking whether the model is physically sensible
